# `kitty-color` sequences

<!-- Generated by `qdb generate reference` from `db/kitty-color.toml`. Do not edit by hand. -->

## Push Kitty Color Stack (`kitty.color.push`)

Saves the terminal color table and dynamic colors for later restoration.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `OSC 30001 ST`
- References: [kitty: Saving and restoring colors](https://sw.kovidgoyal.net/kitty/color-stack/) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/kitty/color_push.seq`](../../../fixtures/kitty/color_push.seq)

## Pop Kitty Color Stack (`kitty.color.pop`)

Restores colors saved by OSC 30001.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `OSC 30101 ST`
- References: [kitty: Saving and restoring colors](https://sw.kovidgoyal.net/kitty/color-stack/) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/kitty/color_pop.seq`](../../../fixtures/kitty/color_pop.seq)

## Query Kitty Color Key (`kitty.color.query`)

Uses Kitty's string-key color protocol instead of xterm OSC color selectors.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `OSC 21 ; key=? ST`
- Responds with: `kitty.color.report`
- References: [kitty: Saving and restoring colors](https://sw.kovidgoyal.net/kitty/color-stack/) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/kitty/color_query.seq`](../../../fixtures/kitty/color_query.seq)
- Conformance: alacritty no-reply; betamax no-reply; kitty supported (30); tmux no-reply; wezterm no-reply

## Set Kitty Color Key (`kitty.color.set`)

Fixture sets the foreground color with a CSS-style hex color.

- Direction: host-to-terminal
- Syntax: `OSC 21 ; key=value ST`
- References: [kitty: Saving and restoring colors](https://sw.kovidgoyal.net/kitty/color-stack/) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/kitty/color_set.seq`](../../../fixtures/kitty/color_set.seq)

## Kitty Color Key Report (`kitty.color.report`)

Reports are preserved syntax today; typed event promotion can be added later.

- Direction: terminal-to-host
- References: [kitty: Saving and restoring colors](https://sw.kovidgoyal.net/kitty/color-stack/) (retrieved 2026-07-06)
- Fixtures: [`fixtures/kitty/kitty_color_report_report_capture_kitty.seq`](../../../fixtures/kitty/kitty_color_report_report_capture_kitty.seq)
